tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad Diversity and EEO

payload.description: Responsible for quarterly EEO and Diversity reports providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts

evidence_refs.source_quote: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.

payload.description: Responsible for annual elevator and escalator reliability and availability report

evidence_refs.source_quote: Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad Operations Planning & Analysis
tool_args.raw_text: 2024 Annual Ridership Report - Operations Planning & Analysis

payload.description: Responsible for annual ridership report on Metro-North's ridership trends

evidence_refs.source_quote: A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.

tool_args.label: Key Performance Metrics Reports
tool_args.raw_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.subject: Key Performance Metrics Reports

tool_args.label: Work Plan
tool_args.raw_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics anticipated to be presented to the Committee for action or for information.

payload.claim_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics anticipated to be presented to the Committee for action or for information. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.
payload.subject: Work Plan
